snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk ūüßü‚Äć‚ôÄÔłŹ

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards ūüĎĽ

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister‚Äôs wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos‚ÄĒuntil he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace‚Äôs centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma

snippet.title: Matka King - Official Trailer | Vijay Varma, Kritika Kamra, Gulshan Grover | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Matka King Official Trailer
Starring Vijay Varma, Kritika Kamra, Sai Tamhankar, Bhupendra Jadawat, Siddharth Jadhav, Gulshan Grover, Bharat Jadhav, Girish Kulkarni, Jamie Lever, Kishor Kadam, Cyrus Sahukar, Arpita Sethiya, Sambhaji Tangade, Ishtiyak Khan, Sanjivv Jotangia, Simran Ashwini
Produced by - Siddharth Roy Kapur, Nagraj Popatrao Manjule, Gargi Kulkarni, Ashwini Sidwani, Ashish Aryan
Created and Written by - Abhay koranne & Nagraj popatrao Manjule
Created & Directed by - Nagraj popatrao Manjule

Official Release Date - April 17, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Spanning the years 1964 to 1975, Matka King is the story of Brij Bhatti, an enterprising cotton trader who teams up with a disgraced ex-soldier and an upper-class widow to start a gambling game called ‚ÄėMatka‚Äô, turning an elite hobby into a parallel economy and an alternative system for a generation that feels let down by the country as it settles into life as a free republic.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages ‚Äď including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal ‚Äď The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video‚Äôs video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures ‚Äď Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

Spanning the years 1964 to 1975, Matka King is the story of Brij Bhatti, an enterprising cotton trader who teams up with a disgraced ex-soldier and an upper-class widow to start a gambling game called ‚ÄėMatka‚Äô, turning an elite hobby into a parallel economy and an alternative system for a generation that feels let down by the country as it settles into life as a free republic.

Additionally, Prime Video‚Äôs video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures ‚Äď Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla Trailer REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Bhooth Bangla Trailer Review By Deeksha Sharma. snippet.title: Patriot Malayalam Trailer | Mammootty | Mohanlal | Mahesh Narayanan | Anto Joseph
snippet.description:
From Anto Joseph Productions, the banner behind some of the most acclaimed and celebrated films in recent times, and visionary filmmaker Mahesh Narayanan, comes the official trailer of Patriot.
Featuring an ensemble of legends: Mammootty, Mohanlal, Fahadh Faasil, Kunchacko Boban, Nayanthara, and Revathy.

Written & Directed by: Mahesh Narayanan
Produced by: Anto Joseph, K. G. Anil Kumar
Co-Produced by: C. R. Saleem, Subhash George Manuel
Music & Original Score: Sushin Shyam
Director of Photography: Manush Nandan ISC
Executive Producers: C. V. Sarathi, Rajesh Krishna
Edited by: Mahesh Narayanan, Rahul Radhakrishnan
Production Design: Shajie Naduvil, Jibin Jacob
Audiography: Vishnu Govind
Sync Sound: Vaisakh P. V.
Production Controller: Dixon Poduthas
Line Producers:
Sunil Singh, Niroop Pinto, Justin Boban, Jeswin Boban
Makeup: Ranjith Ambady
Lyrics: Anwar Ali, Vinayak Sasikumar
Action Directors:
Dhilip Subbarayan, Stunt Silva, Mafia Sasi, Riyaz - Habib, Mahesh Mathew
Costume Design: Dhanya Balakrishnan
Choreography: Shobi Paulraj
VFX:
Firefly, Eggwhite, Ident VFX Lab, Phantom FX, Binary Circus, Pictorial FX
Chief Associate Director: Linu Antony
Associate Director: Phantom Praveen
DI Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar ISC
Stills: Navin Murali
Publicity Design: Aesthetic Kunjamma
PRO: Vaisakh C. Vadakkeveedu, Jinu Anilkumar
Digital PR : Vishnu Sugathan
Trailer Cuts: Arju Benn
Music Team: Nivin Raphael, Rithu Vysakh, Moses Toby
Trailer Music Mixed and Mastered - Abin Paul

Mahari ebbe sharafat dekhi sai fetange jis din bigdange , 
R mahrete k mahare saaye te bhi log ye darkai likdenge, 
Hum na hawabaaj r bande Or na chalchalan k gande r na karne faddu dhande baat sda syani rakhange 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange,

Are lehrande asle dikhenge r dikhenge sareaam bhagat, 
Bdhabad goli chalengi r chalengi sareaam bhagat, 
Re wepon khas mangau mota naam yamraj ka dhardu jhota kadhle goli khoon ek lota mot ki rani rakhenge,

Text:
Mahari ebbe sharafat dekhi sai hai jis din bigdange, 
R mahrete k mahare saaye te bhi log ye darkai likdenge, 
Hum na hawabaaj r bande Or na chalchalan k gande r na karne faddu dhande baat sda syani rakhange 
Sind dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

R jo khele khel jo loga n ve aapa khtam bnadyange, thamne to reel bnai se appa film bnadyange, 
Janta Dekh K Hoja Bauli, Barsai JB Pital Ki Goli Kheli Jagi Khoon Ki Holi Pistal Taani Rakhange, 
Sind DC n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

Sind Lehrande asle dikhenge r dikhenge sareaam bhagat, 
Bdhabad goli chalengi r chalengi sareaam bhagat, 
Re wepon khas mangau mota naam yamraj ka dhardu jhota kadhle goli khoon ek lota mot ki rani rakhenge, 
Sind dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 

Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande Khani Rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange...

snippet.title: Michael (2026) Final Trailer - Jaafar Jackson
snippet.description:
MICHAEL ‚Äď in theaters and IMAX April 24, 2026. Starring Jaafar Jackson, Nia Long, Juliano Valdi, KeiLyn Durrel Jones, Laura Harrier, with Miles Teller, and Colman Domingo. Get tickets now: https://tickets.michael.movie/

Subscribe to the LIONSGATE YouTube Channel for the latest movie trailers, clips, and more: https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym

https://www.instagram.com/michaelmovie/
https://www.facebook.com/michaelmovie
https://x.com/michaelmovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelthemovie
https://www.threads.com/@michaelmovie

#MichaelMovie

MICHAEL is the cinematic portrayal of the life and legacy of one of the most influential artists the world has ever known. The film tells the story of Michael Jackson‚Äôs life beyond the music, tracing his journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world. Highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career, the film gives audiences a front-row seat to Michael Jackson as never before. This is where his story begins.

MICHAEL adalah penggambaran sinematik tentang kehidupan dan warisan salah satu seniman paling berpengaruh yang pernah dikenal dunia. Film ini mengisahkan kehidupan Michael Jackson di luar musik, menelusuri perjalanannya dari penemuan bakat luar biasanya sebagai vokalis utama Jackson Five, hingga menjadi seniman visioner yang ambisi kreatifnya mendorong pengejaran tanpa henti untuk menjadi penghibur terbesar di dunia. snippet.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Final Trailer
snippet.description:
Watch the new trailer for The Devil Wears Prada 2 with original song ‚ÄúRunway‚ÄĚ performed by Lady Gaga and Doechii. Get tickets now and experience the film only in theaters May 1: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel‚ÄĒMeryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as ‚ÄúLily‚ÄĚ and ‚ÄúIrv‚ÄĚ from the first film. 
 
‚ÄúThe Devil Wears Prada 2‚ÄĚ is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

snippet.title: GUBUN RAIJWNI NONGA Official Bodo Music Video 2026 | Nikita Boro | Asha Boro | Sudemsona | Lee Shaan
snippet.description:
NIKITA BORO OFFICIAL Presents

"GUBUN RAIJWNI NONGA "
A Latest Bodo Music Video 2026

Produced by-- SANJ



‚ÄúGubun Raijwni Nonga‚ÄĚ sung by Aasha Boro and Nikitaa Boro is a beautiful musical piece that blends emotion with melody. The composition by "Swmkhwr Daimari" adds a rich and captivating musical layer that perfectly complements the mood of the track, The song carries a deep cultural essence, reflecting love, longing, and heartfelt expression through its lyrics and soulful voices.
                 What truly elevates the song is the stunning choreography by " Lee Shaan Ramy" who brings the music to life through graceful and powerful dance movements. Every step reflects the essence of the song, making it not just something to listen to, but something to feel and experience.
            Overall, ‚ÄúGubun Raijwni Nonga‚ÄĚ stands as a perfect blend of melody, emotion, and visual storytelling‚ÄĒleaving a lasting impression on its audience

Both singers bring a unique charm to the track‚ÄĒAsha Boro‚Äôs soothing tone and Nikita Boro‚Äôs expressive delivery perfectly complement each other.
The music creates a calm yet powerful atmosphere, allowing listeners to connect with the feelings behind the song. ‚ÄúGubun Raijwni Nonga‚ÄĚ stands out not only for its melodious composition but also for the way it represents regional music with pride and authenticity



AUDIO CREDITS
Singer- AASHA BORO & NIKITAA BORO
Lyrics and Tune- SWMKHWR DAIMARI
Music/Mix Mastered by- AMAR BORO

snippet.title: FIGHTING WITH MONSTERS IN ZOO ūüėĪ | ZOONOMALY LIVE ūüĒī | #zoonomaly #granny #shorts #shortsfeed
snippet.description:
FIGHTING WITH MONSTERS IN ZOO ūüėĪ | ZOONOMALY LIVE ūüĒī | #zoonomaly #granny #shorts #shortsfeed                                  
.
.
TODAY WE ARE CELEBRATING RAM NAUVI ON OUR LIVESTREAM.
.
.
ZOONOMALY LIVE Gameplay ūüėĪ

snippet.title: Braj Ras (Official Video) | Hari Ras Baithak | B Praak | Jaani | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record presents "Braj Ras" 

Hari Ras Baithak is a soulful Sankirtan experience where music becomes devotion and every note carries the divine name. In an intimate baithak setting, it invites you to pause, reflect, and immerse yourself in the bliss of bhakti.


Singer - B Praak
Composition - B Praak and Traditional 
Lyrics - Jaani and Traditonal 
Music - B Praak and Mir Desai 
Video - Prateek Thakur 

Spl Thanks - Yogi and Ananda for Shyam Sundar Lyrics 

Live rhythms arranged and performed by Krishna kishor & Team

Percussionists - 
K V Prasad 
Ganesh Rao 
Samual 
Rahul 
Recorded by Lijesh Kumar (Chennai) 

Carnatic Violin - Manas Kumar 
Ethnic Strokes - Tapas Roy 
Harmonium - Shibbu ji
AC Guitars and Bass - Shomu Seal 

Instruments Recorded at MidnightOwl Studios 

Chorus - Sudhanshu Shome and Team 

Boys 
Sudhanshu Shome 
Pankaj Dixit 
Mridul Ghosh

Girls 
Bhagyashree V Mhatre
Mayuri Kudalkar 
Pallavi roy

Recorded at Input One by Samir Dharap

Mixed and Mastered by Abhishek Ghatak


Creative Director - Piyush Thakur
DOP - Nanni Gill
Editor - Mayank Thapar 
Line Producer - Neeraj Bhatt ( Bhatt Production )
1st AD - Manik Thakur
Colourist - Aman Rajowal 
VFX - Gagan Matharoo 
Local LP - Arya Chaudhary
Choreographer - Sonu Arizona
Make up artist - Gill
Art Director - Rahul and Rohit
Creatives - Siddhesh Katkar

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

‚Ėļ About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. Kripa‚Äôs diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.title: Unknown Gunman Official Teaser
snippet.description:
In 2016 the most common comment on my videos was¬†"you are the most underrated YouTuber in India."¬†It's 2026. I still get it.

I used to not know how to feel about that. Now I do. Because the people who said it  kept showing up. Every single year. And that's not underrated. That's everything.

Couldn't ask for more. Genuinely blessed.

Watch the teaser. Share it if it hits. Comment if you feel it. That's the only currency we have right now  and it means everything.¬†‚Ě§ÔłŹ

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Bairan - Banjaare

‚úĖ Stream / Download:
https://open.spotify.com/album/3ZIsrV7xUXWX4tR0vk1CGF

‚úĖ Follow Banjaare:
https://instagram.com/official_banjaare

ūüé§  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaar–Ķ ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue m–Ķin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

Delhi Capitals vs Gujarat Titans LIVE Updates, IPL 2026: Delhi Capitals (DC) captain Axar Patel has won the toss and opted to bowl against Gujarat Titans (GT) in their crucial IPL 2026 clash in Delhi on Wednesday. Gujarat Titans captain Shubman Gill is back in the playing XI after missing their previous game due to injury. His primary objective will be to get GT back on track and help them register their first victory of IPL 2026. On the other hand, Delhi Capitals are off to a great start with two wins in as many games so far, thanks to an in-form bowling unit and the sensational performances of uncapped batter Sameer Rizvi. snippet.title: Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main | Sanjay Dutt | Kavita Krishnamurthy, Vinod Rathod | Khal Nayak
snippet.description:
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main | Sanjay Dutt | Kavita Krishnamurthy, Vinod Rathod | Khal Nayak

#kavitakrishnamurthy #vinodrathod #khalnayak #bollywoodsongs #hindisong #sanjaydutt 

Song Credits:
Song: Khal Nayak Hoon Mein
Movie: Khal Nayak
Singers: Kavita Krishnamurthy, Vinod Rathod
Lyrics: Anand Bakshi
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal

Movie Credits:
Producer: Subhash Ghai
Director: Subhash Ghai
StarCast: Sanjay Dutt, Jackie Shroff, Madhuri Dixit, Raakhee, Anupam Kher

Song Lyrics:

Ji Haan 
Main Hoon Khal Nayak

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu 
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu 

Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hai Tu
Is Pyaar Ki Tujhko Kya Kadar
Is Pyaar Ke Kahan Layak Hai Tu

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main 
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main

Teri Tabiyat Toh Rangeen Hai 
Par Tu Mohabbat Ki Tauheen Hai

Kuch Bhi Nahi Yaad Iske Siwa
Na Main Kisika Na Koi Mera
Jo Cheez Maangi Nahi Woh Mili
Karta Main Kya Aur Bas Chheen Li
Bas Chheen Li
Bas Chheen Li

Main Bhi Sharafat Se Jeeta Magar
Mujhko Shareefon Se Lagta Tha Darr
Sabko Pata Tha Main Kamzor Hoon
Main Isliye Aaj Kuch Aur Hoon
Kuch Aur Hoon
Kuch Aur Hoon

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main 
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu

Kitne Khilono Se Khela Hai Tu 
Afsos Phir Bhi Akela Hai Tu

Kaise Badalti Jawani Meri

snippet.description:
ŗ§ģŗ•čŗ§Ļŗ•á ŗ§ģŗ•čŗ§į ŗ§¨ŗ§®ŗ§áŗ§Įŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ•č ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§ßŗ§ĺ | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

Song: ŗ§ģŗ•čŗ§Ļŗ•á ŗ§ģŗ•čŗ§į ŗ§¨ŗ§®ŗ§áŗ§Įŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ•č ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§ßŗ§ĺ | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan


Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

ŗ§ģŗ•čŗ§Ļŗ•á ŗ§ģŗ•čŗ§į ŗ§¨ŗ§®ŗ§áŗ§Įŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ•č ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§ßŗ§ĺ - ŗ§Ķŗ•Éŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§® ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§áŗ§ł ŗ§™ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§® ŗ§ßŗ•Āŗ§® ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§ā ŗ§Ėŗ•č ŗ§úŗ§ĺŗ§Źŗ§Āŗ•§ Bhajan Tune ŗ§Üŗ§™ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§≤ŗ§Ņŗ§Ź ŗ§≤ŗ•áŗ§ēŗ§į ŗ§Üŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•ą ŗ§∂ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§ßŗ§ĺ-ŗ§ēŗ•Éŗ§∑ŗ•ćŗ§£ ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§ģŗ§Ļŗ§Ņŗ§ģŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§Źŗ§ē ŗ§źŗ§łŗ§ĺ ŗ§≠ŗ§úŗ§® ŗ§úŗ•č ŗ§Üŗ§™ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§Ļŗ•Éŗ§¶ŗ§Į ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§∂ŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§§ŗ§Ņ ŗ§Ēŗ§į ŗ§Üŗ§®ŗ§āŗ§¶ ŗ§łŗ•á ŗ§≠ŗ§į ŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§óŗ§ĺŗ•§

ŗ§Įŗ§Ļ ŗ§ģŗ§ßŗ•Āŗ§į ŗ§Ēŗ§į ŗ§≠ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§™ŗ•āŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§£ Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ŗ§¨ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ú ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§™ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§® ŗ§≠ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§®ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ēŗ§į ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§ßŗ§ĺ-ŗ§ēŗ•Éŗ§∑ŗ•ćŗ§£ ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§Ķŗ•ćŗ§Į ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•áŗ§ģ ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§łŗ§ģŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§™ŗ§Ņŗ§§ ŗ§Ļŗ•ąŗ•§
‚Äúŗ§ģŗ•čŗ§Ļŗ•á ŗ§ģŗ•čŗ§į ŗ§¨ŗ§®ŗ§áŗ§Įŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ•č ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§ßŗ§ĺŗ§Öŗ§™ŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§Ķŗ•Éŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§® ŗ§ēŗ•č‚ÄĚ ‚Äď ŗ§Įŗ§Ļ ŗ§™ŗ§āŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ§Ņ ŗ§≠ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§§ ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§Čŗ§ł ŗ§Ķŗ§Ņŗ§®ŗ§ģŗ•ćŗ§į ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§•ŗ§®ŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§¶ŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§∂ŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•Ä ŗ§Ļŗ•ą, ŗ§úŗ§Ļŗ§ĺŗ§Ā ŗ§Ķŗ§Ļ ŗ§¨ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§úŗ§ßŗ§ĺŗ§ģ ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§ā ŗ§ģŗ•čŗ§į ŗ§¨ŗ§®ŗ§ēŗ§į ŗ§≠ŗ•Ä ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§ßŗ§ĺ-ŗ§ēŗ•Éŗ§∑ŗ•ćŗ§£ ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§öŗ§įŗ§£ŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§ā ŗ§įŗ§Ļŗ§®ŗ§ĺ ŗ§öŗ§ĺŗ§Ļŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•ąŗ•§

ŗ§Įŗ§Ļ ŗ§≠ŗ§úŗ§® ŗ§ßŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§®, ŗ§úŗ§™, ŗ§łŗ•Āŗ§¨ŗ§Ļ-ŗ§∂ŗ§ĺŗ§ģ ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§™ŗ•āŗ§úŗ§ĺ, ŗ§Ķŗ•Éŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§® ŗ§≠ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ§Ņ, ŗ§ēŗ•Äŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ§® ŗ§Ēŗ§į ŗ§ģŗ§® ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§∂ŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§§ŗ§Ņ ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§≤ŗ§Ņŗ§Ź ŗ§Öŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§āŗ§§ ŗ§Čŗ§™ŗ§Įŗ•Āŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§§ ŗ§Ļŗ•ąŗ•§ ŗ§áŗ§łŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§∂ŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§§ ŗ§ßŗ•Āŗ§® ŗ§Ēŗ§į ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•áŗ§ģŗ§™ŗ•āŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§£ ŗ§∂ŗ§¨ŗ•ćŗ§¶ ŗ§Üŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§ģŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§łŗ•Āŗ§ēŗ•āŗ§® ŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§§ŗ•á ŗ§Ļŗ•ąŗ§ā ŗ§Ēŗ§į ŗ§ģŗ§® ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§Ķŗ•Éŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§® ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§óŗ§≤ŗ§Ņŗ§Įŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§ā ŗ§≤ŗ•á ŗ§úŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•á ŗ§Ļŗ•ąŗ§āŗ•§

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

Lyrics:
Take your shoes off
Thank you for dinner baby
I had a really great time
I really loved the conversation
And that your car self drives
The pineapple air freshener
Is my favorite kind
Well this is me but
if you have time
Do you want the house tour?
I could take you to the first, second, third floor
And I promise none of this is a metaphor
I just want you to come inside
Baby what's mine is now yours
The couch is really comfy comfy
Got some Chips Ahoy
If you're hungry hungry
You don't need to love me, love me, love me
I'm just so proud of my design
(to dim the lights)
Do you want the house tour?
I could take you to the first, second, third floor
And I promise none of this is a metaphor
I just want you to come inside
But never enter through the back door
House tour
Yeah, I spent a little fortune on the waxed floors
We can be a little reckless cause it's insured
I'm pleasured to be your hot tour guide
Baby what's mine is now yours
(Oh baby if you come inside, if you come inside
I might let you uh)
My house is on pretty girl avenue
My house was especially built for you
Some say it's a place where your dreams come true
My house
Could be your house too!
So um
Are you coming in or what?

#SabrinaCarpenter #HouseTour #MansBestFriend

Lirik:
Lepaskan sepatumu
Terima kasih untuk makan malamnya, sayang
Aku sangat menikmati waktu itu
Aku sangat menyukai percakapan kita
Dan mobilmu bisa mengemudi sendiri
Pengharum ruangan nanas
Adalah favoritku
Nah, ini aku, tapi
jika kamu punya waktu
Apakah kamu ingin melihat tur rumahnya?

Aku bisa membawamu ke lantai satu, dua, tiga
Dan aku janji semua ini bukan metafora
Aku hanya ingin kau masuk ke dalam
Sayang, apa yang milikku sekarang menjadi milikmu
Sofanya sangat nyaman
Ada Chips Ahoy
Jika kau lapar
Kau tidak perlu mencintaiku, mencintaiku, mencintaiku
Aku hanya sangat bangga dengan desainku
(untuk meredupkan lampu)
Apakah kau ingin tur rumah?

Aku bisa membawamu ke lantai satu, dua, tiga
Dan aku janji semua ini bukan metafora
Aku hanya ingin kau masuk
Tapi jangan pernah masuk lewat pintu belakang
Tur rumah
Ya, aku menghabiskan banyak uang untuk lantai yang dipoles
Kita bisa sedikit nekat karena diasuransikan
Aku senang menjadi pemandu wisata seksimu
Sayang, apa yang milikku sekarang menjadi milikmu
(Oh sayang, jika kau masuk, jika kau masuk
Aku mungkin akan membiarkanmu uh)
Rumahku di jalan gadis cantik
Rumahku dibangun khusus untukmu
Ada yang bilang ini tempat di mana mimpimu menjadi kenyataan
Rumahku
Bisa jadi rumahmu juga!

Jadi um
Kau mau masuk atau tidak?

#themudgil #ritaulirohtak 

AVAILABLE ON ALL OTHER PLATFORMS....

 Song Credits : 

Song - Thari Bolero

Singer - Harsh Mudgil
https://instagram.com/harsh__mudgil

Female Singer  - Swara Verma 

Lyrics - Harsh Mudgil 

Composer -  Harsh Mudgil

Music - Harsh Mudgil 

Mixing  - Sagar Kaushik

Mastering - Sagar Kaushik 

Recording Engineering - Sagar Kaushik

Video - Lakshay Vashishth

Digital Media - Sting Tune 

Online Promotion - Bholenathūü§ĚūüĒĪ

Label -@Harsh Mudgil  
----------------------------------------------


Lyrics-

Thari Bolero 

F- Jha Bhi Jao Sath MaiJao
Pakki Jodi Doyaa Ki

M- Sarkaar Avaidh Bataya Kare 
Taskari Chale Un Lohya Ki

F-
Na suii tikti 100 t niche 
 
M- Bairi Dekh Aankhya N Miche

Jo Apne Aap Mai Gundey Sai
Gandya Ki Dhala Cholla Rai

F- 
Chaale Thari Bolero Paadti
Naake Or Sab Tolla Nai
Male- 
Karke Vaake Khujaa Baabe 
Paade Sabke Wholla Nai



1

F-
 kaan Pai vertue Laake Nai
 Thum Naad Pai teko Asla Nai

M- Hum Maang Firoti Lala Pai
Chutki Mai Metdya Maslya Nai

F- 
Kai Kai Mukbar Shehar Mai Sai
Tere Kitna Dum Hai Seene Mai

M- 
Kade Khatu Ji Kade Salasar
Mhari Jaale Gaadi Mhine Mai



F- Teri Ankhya Mai Mane Rum Laage 
M-  Na Na Madam Ji Bum Laage 
Mhare Aave Dudhiya Aisa 
Jo pistol Rakhe Sai Dola mai




Rap 
M- Aaye Hayee   R gori Mhare Apne Asool
F- Oye Hoe tu Role rakkhe  kyate Befizool

M-

M-Aay Haay Rai Gori Hum Paar Jaava Maar 
Banda Tohya Bhi Na Paana

F- Oee Hoee Tera Naam Chaale Itnak
Bairi Tne Jaane Har City Ala Thana

Chehre Pai Smile Pavgi 
Khi Baat Rai Misail pavgi
Jai Aaja Koi Yaara Nai Bhsad 
Call Mudgil Ki Dial Pavgi


2- F-
Tne Dekh Dekh Kai Jale Padosi
 Jalan Ke Tender Lere S

M-
Gori Chaale Gaadi Mhari
Silencor Inke Dhume Dere Sai


F- Teri Baata Mai Mane Dum Laage 
Producer Nai Kyu Kam Laage
Mai inke Lable Khoduga 
Jai aagya apne Rolla Mai
